Returns a list of active API tokens with their metadata (creation date, last used, permissions level). Use these tokens for Bearer token authentication in API requests. Tokens can be read-only or read/write depending on their configuration.

Added context about token metadata, authentication usage, and permission levels to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.
